languages.text: "Пока вы под моим покровительством — вам ничего не грозит".
"As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."
languages.original_text: "Пока вы под моим покровительством — вам ничего не грозит".

traits.locale_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."
"As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."
"As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

languages.text: 「私の保護下にいる限り、あなたは危険にさらされない」
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

languages.text: "Benim korumam altında olduğun sürece tehlikede değilsin."
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

traits.locale_text: "Benim korumam altında olduğun sürece tehlikede değilsin."

languages.text: “只要你们受我庇护，就不会有危险。”
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

traits.locale_text: “只要你们受我庇护，就不会有危险。”

languages.text: "Solange Ihr unter meinem Schutz steht, droht Euch keine Gefahr."
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

traits.locale_text: "Solange Ihr unter meinem Schutz steht, droht Euch keine Gefahr."

languages.text: « Tant que vous resterez sous ma protection, vous ne risquerez rien. »
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

traits.locale_text: « Tant que vous resterez sous ma protection, vous ne risquerez rien. »

languages.text: «Mientras esté bajo mi protección, no corre peligro».
languages.original_text: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."

traits.locale_text: «Mientras esté bajo mi protección, no corre peligro».
